name: probe-mcp
description: MCP server for structural codebase exploration (Step 0 spike)

scripts.spike:parse: npm run copy:grammars && npm run build:spike && node dist-spike/spike/parse.js
scripts.spike:server: npm run copy:grammars && npm run build:spike && node dist-spike/spike/server.js
scripts.spike:inspect: npm run copy:grammars && npm run build:spike && npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node dist-spike/spike/server.js
